At Sun Pharma, sustainability is more than a pledge â it is a continuous journey of purposeful action. We are committed to transforming our environmental and social responsibilities into tangible, measurable outcomes that create enduring value for our stakeholders and the planet.
Our Company Driving Health Outcomes We are dedicated to developing high-quality, innovative pharmaceutical products that reinforce healthcare systems and improve patient outcomes around the world.

I am happy to share with you that Sun Pharma has been recognised among the Top 5% of pharmaceutical companies globally in the S&P Global Sustainability Yearbook, reaffirming our commitment to corporate sustainability. This recognition reflects our progress and dedication to responsible business practices.

Our ESG Strategy Sustainable Strategy for Sustainable Future At Sun Pharma, our ESG strategy is deeply aligned with our core values, which serve as the foundation of our culture and guide every action and decision we make.

Environmental Stewardship Environmental sustainability is integral to our corporate strategy and a defining strategic priority. We pursue targeted actions to reduce the environmental footprint of our operations and focus on preventing and mitigating adverse impacts.

Workforce Resilience and Well-being Our workforce is important for our success. Aligned with our vision of 'Reaching People, Touching Lives' worldwide as a top provider of valuable medicines, we are dedicated to nurturing and enhancing the potential of our diverse and dynamic workforce.

Corporate Governance Aligned with our core values, our approach to corporate governance and business ethics is characterised by quality, reliability, trust, consistency, and transparency. We are dedicated to maintaining the highest standards of ethical business practices, which strengthens our efforts to create and provide shared value for all stakeholders.

Product Stewardship & Access to Healthcare Access to safe and effective medicines is crucial for universal healthcare coverage. We are committed to providing high-quality medications to patients and healthcare professionals worldwide.

Communities At Sun Pharma, our CSR initiatives reflect our core mission of âReaching People, Touching Lives.â We support programmes focused on healthcare, education, livelihoods, and climate action, aiming to create lasting, positive change in the communities we serve.

We have mapped our public disclosures of 2024 data to the sustainability-related topics identified by SASB as most significant for the electric and natural gas industries.

We are participating in initiatives led by Edison Electric Institute and American Gas Association to promote consistency and transparency in sustainability reporting across the energy utility sector. As part of these efforts, we are presenting environmental, social and governance information in a combined EEI and AGA reporting template.

We have disclosed information regarding our operations and ESG goals, risks and opportunities to CDP for more than a decade. CDP, formerly the Carbon Disclosure Project, is a nongovernmental organization that runs a disclosure system to help companies, cities, states and regions measure and manage their environmental impacts.
